name: Exit Poll of the Apocalypse
text:
Each player predicts out loud whether the Doomsday Clock will reach midnight before the game ends. Record the predictions. Then each opponent who predicted "no" loses 3 life, because pessimism is the only correct policy here.
Put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each player at the table. Turnout was apocalyptic.
flavorText: "And how did you vote today?" "For the end of all things." "And do you feel your vote will be counted?" "...Does it matter?"
